prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "前后跨步" (front-and-back agility hops) exercise, side view, facing right. Person posture: Athletic person CLEARLY AIRBORNE mid-flight during a forward agility hop. The figure is OFF THE GROUND with visible empty space below both feet. BOTH FEET ARE TOGETHER, side-by-side and parallel — feet touching or very close, like one unit. Both knees slightly bent in mid-flight. The body is moving forward (toward the right side of the frame). Arms held at chest height, bent at the elbows, close to the body for balance. Torso upright with slight forward lean. Plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top. CRITICAL: this is a HOPPING drill with BOTH FEET TOGETHER as one unit — NOT a running stride with feet apart, NOT a single-leg hop. The body is AIRBORNE OFF THE GROUND.. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: calf muscles and quadriceps and gluteus maximus for quick reactive jumps. Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: core muscles and hamstring group. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "小腿三头肌" pointing to the calf muscles; "股四头肌 / 臀大肌" pointing to the quadriceps and glute area; "核心 / 腘绳肌" pointing to the core and hamstring area. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
